title: phleum bertolonii subsp. trabutii
intro: Phleum bertolonii subsp. trabutii, also known as Trabut's timothy grass or Phleum trabutii, is a subspecies of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Phleum bertolonii subsp. trabutii include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Phleum bertolonii subsp. trabutii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
